title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
why_matters: The first time the US government has used export control authority to force a commercial frontier AI model offline for all users — setting a potential precedent for state control of AI deployments.

title: SpaceX IPO closes up 19% and delivers the world's first trillionaire
why_matters: SpaceX is the most valuable company ever to go public, validating a new premium class of 'strategic tech' and reshaping the calculus for private-to-public tech transitions.

title: Open source AI must win
why_matters: Frames closed AI dependency as a structural risk for any organization or nation building on rented cognition — the argument for open infrastructure becomes harder to dismiss after today's Anthropic model shutdown.

title: Brain-inspired chip runs near absolute zero and could transform quantum computing
source_label: Science Daily / University of Hong Kong
why_matters: Removes a key engineering bottleneck in scaling quantum computers — the heat generated by control electronics — using materials already mass-produced for EVs and power grids.

title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
why_matters: Would make Mistral Europe's most valuable AI company and signals that sovereign AI — open, non-US, locally deployable — is attracting serious capital precisely when US labs are being restricted.
